_meta.note: Model-identity normalization for the Collective leaderboard. Applied hub-side at ingest so gpt-4o, openai/gpt-4o, and dated variants like gpt-4o-2024-08-06 merge into one row instead of three. A `provider/` prefix on the model is stripped algorithmically (no entry needed); this file only lists provider synonyms and the dated/aliased model names to collapse to a family. Any identity NOT listed here passes through unchanged, so a new model is never silently mis-merged. Keys match case-insensitively.
